evidence: last.log shows flutter test capture exit_code=1 with A RenderFlex overflowed by 1.1 pixels on the right for Row at login_version_1_layout.dart:42:9633 with constraints BoxConstraints(w=327.0, h=18.0) and an overflowing horizontal flex
laws.repairShape: Ensure flex row child widths do not exceed parent constraint width when parent has fixed width and children lack flex factors. The row emitter should enforce that total unexpanded child intrinsic widths fit within parent width, introducing flex factors, wrapping, or overflow detection guards as needed.
forbidden: Adding magic padding or margins to hide overflow
Suppressing overflow errors without layout fix
Using ClipRect or overflowBox as a layout workaround
